name: Advancing Multimodal Judge Models through a Capability-Oriented Benchmark and MCTS-Driven Data Generation
summary: arXiv:2603.00546v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Using Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) as judges to achieve precise and consistent evaluations has gradually become an emerging paradigm...
description: arXiv:2603.00546v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Using Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) as judges to achieve precise and consistent evaluations has gradually become an emerging paradigm across various domains. Evaluating the capability and reliability of MLLM-as-a-judge systems is therefore essential for ensuring trustworthy assessment. Existing judge benchmarks categorize samples by...
author: Zeyu Chen, Huanjin Yao, Ziwang Zhao, Min Yang
